title: XP-38 All-Terrain Roughrider
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''XP-38 All-Terrain Roughrider''' produced by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] was an updated version of the [[XP-38 sport landspeeder]], modified for use on rough terrain.

It was similar in design to the earlier [[X-34 landspeeder/Legends|X-34]]; in fact, it looked much like a slim version of this older model. Its engines were similar to the [[Seraph-class urban landspeeder|Flash speeders]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

This updated, sleeker model was a popular civilian speeder, and was also often used by Imperial forces as a support vehicle at planetary garrisons.

The [[XP-38 sport landspeeder]] was released shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and customers soon found that its [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] system made travel over rough terrain quite difficult. This modified version corrected that problem.

The release of this updated speeder lowered the resale value of the earlier X-34.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-09-30 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''
